headline: The Mag 7 or Terrific 2? Which Tech Giants are Best Positioned for What Comes Next in AI?

headline: The AI Revolution May Still Be in Early Innings. And NVIDIA’s Stepping Up to Bat
summary: The AI boom seems to be “so 2025” at this point. Apart from specific corners of the semi scene (most notably the ones in the right place at the right time), big tech and AI have looked like a money-losing trade.
